name: Food Delivery Price Intelligence API
description: Extract restaurant menus, item prices, delivery fees, promotions, ratings, and estimated delivery times from Uber Eats, DoorDash, and Grubhub. Cross-platform price comparison for any address.

endpoints.description: Search restaurants by cuisine or name on a food delivery platform

params.query: string (required) — restaurant name or cuisine type

endpoints.description: Get restaurant details: rating, delivery fee, delivery time, minimum order, promotions
Full menu extraction with item prices, descriptions, categories, and customizations
Cross-platform price comparison: same search across multiple delivery platforms simultaneously

params.query: string (required) — restaurant name or cuisine type

useCases: Ghost kitchen operators analyzing competitor pricing
Restaurant chains monitoring delivery platform fees
Food-tech startups building price comparison tools
Market research on delivery fee trends by area
proxyRequirement: Mobile proxies required — food delivery apps are mobile-first, use location-based content serving that trusts mobile carrier IPs, and block datacenter/residential ranges
